creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Mij <mij@bitchx.it> -----

Sorry for the delay.

This patch is somewhat suboptimal, as with version 1.5 we could switch
to using the Log Sucker feature so as to simplify the port and fix this:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2008-December/051691.html .

I have a patch underway that
1) removes the auto-syslog-configuration logic (kicks pkg-(de)install)
2) provides a RC script for starting SSHGuard with log sucking at boot
3) provides a rc.conf knob for listing which log sources shall be monitored

Which is cool. But I know that shall take me another month before submitting.
So please just commit Matthias' patch for the time being â perfect is worst
enemy of good.

_______________________________________________
freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org mailing list
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-bugs
To unsubscribe, send any mail to "freebsd-ports-bugs-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"

----- End forwarded message -----
